---
title: "GP - Project Proposal Presentation"
subtitle: "subtitle here"
author: "**Group 2:** <br> Kevin Bachez, Alexa Bueno, Leeann Lewis-Waddell, <br> Ron Stephen Sabilla, Brian Vuong"
format:
  revealjs: 
    theme: solarized
    slide-number: true
    scrollable: true
    controls: true
footer: "IBM6540 | July 15, 2026"
---

# Problem Definition

enter text

# Research Objectives

enter text

# Importance of the Topic

enter text

# Population

enter text

# Sampling Data Collection

enter text

# Data Wrangling

enter text

# R01

enter text

# R02

enter text

# R03

enter text

# R04

enter text

# R05

enter text

# Conclusion

enter text
